parent_version.note: v1 MainScreenView.swift shipped 2026-03-14 before PM workflow enforcement. State file was a backfill record (2026-04-06 audit reconstruction). v2 is the first deliberate UX Foundations alignment pass on this surface.

v2_partial_alignment_already_landed.description: Home background swapped from goal-progress orange/blue layer to saturated appBlue1 → appBlue2 2-stop gradient. Removed invisible color metaphor. NOT on this branch — will land via the iOS hardening PR.

transitions.note: v1 retroactive backfill — feature was shipped pre-PM workflow.
v2 UX alignment pass kickoff. Mirrors Onboarding v2 pilot pattern (audit → ux-research → ux-spec → compliance → patches). Tracking issue #60.

Phase 0 complete. v2-audit-report.md delivered with 27 findings (8 P0, 14 P1, 4 P2, 1 positive). User reviewed all 6 audit segments and answered every open question (OQ-1 through OQ-22 + Q9/Q10/Q11). Decisions Log appended to audit file (commit 844a2ba). New project rule established: analytics screen-prefix naming convention (commit ef201e7). Three sub-features queued post-Home-v2: Status+Goal merged card, Metric Tile Deep Linking, Onboarding v2 retroactive refactor.

Phase 1 complete. v2 PRD addendum written at .claude/features/home-today-screen/prd.md. Covers: 22 P0+P1 findings in scope, 5 items deferred to sub-features, analytics spec (3 events + 1 deferred), success metrics, 35+ acceptance criteria, kill criteria, testing strategy. ~8-9 day estimate. Approved by user 2026-04-09.

Phase 2 complete. 17 tasks in 4 layers: foundation (9 parallel), assembly (T8), post-assembly (T11-T13), verification (T14-T17). Critical path ~5 days with parallelism. Task file at .claude/features/home-today-screen/tasks.md.
Phase 3 complete. ux-research.md (12/13 principles mapped), ux-spec.md (9 sections), heuristic validation 12/12 pass, compliance gateway 5/5 pass, UX + Design build prompts generated.

Phase 4 complete. 16/17 tasks done (T16 snapshot tests deferred to Phase 5 manual). 6 commits: foundation layer, v2 MainScreenView (703 lines), a11y pass, pbxproj swap, tests (21 cases), checklist walk. T8 is the main assembly — bottom-up rewrite from design system.

Category B reconcile (open-items audit 2026-04-20): 17 tasks and 1 phases flipped to completed to match shipped reality. Home v2 shipped in PR #61, merged as bf3bd67. Case study: docs/case-studies/home-today-screen-v2-case-study.md. T1-T17 tasks reconciled 2026-04-20 — implementation commits 8b5fdf2, 136efe3, f266932, ec95eaa, 73df335 (Phase 4 section of the case study has the task→commit breakdown).

v2_substeps_completed: v2-audit-report.md (27 findings: 8 P0, 14 P1, 4 P2, 1 positive)
Decisions Log appended (OQ-1 through OQ-22 + Q9/Q10/Q11)
Pending DS Evolution Queue updated in feature-memory.md (8 new tokens, 2 component promotions queued)

decisions_summary.stack_order: 7 items: Toolbar → Greeting → ReadinessCard → Training & Nutrition → Status → Goal → Metrics. Scrollable.
decisions_summary.training_nutrition_card: renamed from Start Training; side-by-side equal CTAs (Start Workout + Log Meal); single inline context line
decisions_summary.live_info_strip: static, no rotation, concat greeting + streak when both apply
decisions_summary.readiness_card: promote existing component to first card
decisions_summary.status_goal: ship as separate v1-style cards in Home v2; merged sub-feature ships later as own PM cycle
decisions_summary.metrics: read-only in Home v2; deep-link sub-feature spun off
decisions_summary.f26_promotions: AppMetricColumn + AppMetricTile promoted in Home v2 Phase 4
decisions_summary.analytics: 4 new home_* events (screen-prefix rule), ship together with v2

subfeatures_queued: Onboarding v2 retroactive refactor (next per-screen alignment)
Status+Goal merged sub-feature (own PM cycle, parent Home v2)
Metric Tile Deep Linking (own PM cycle, parent Home v2)

prd.non_scope: F11 goal drill-down, F13 macro strip, home_metric_tile_tap, metric deep-linking, Status+Goal merged card

testing.reconciliation_note: Home v2 shipped in PR #61, merged as bf3bd67. Case study: docs/case-studies/home-today-screen-v2-case-study.md. T1-T17 tasks reconciled 2026-04-20 — implementation commits 8b5fdf2, 136efe3, f266932, ec95eaa, 73df335 (Phase 4 section of the case study has the task→commit breakdown).

metrics.kill_criteria: Core screen — always active. v2 alignment only ships if no readiness/biometric flow regresses.
